markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final check-in on launch readiness and contingency planning.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Readiness:** The product is nearly ready, with the historical data upgrade path and billing flow complete. The main focus is now on polishing the onboarding UI.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Scalability Plan:** The backfill process is being split into a separate worker to isolate its heavy database load. This allows for independent scaling to manage traffic spikes without impacting core app performance.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Support Strategy:** Intercom will serve as the initial support channel, using an AI co-pilot trained on an internal knowledge base to provide fast, consistent answers and capture user questions for future help content.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** A phased launch is planned to manage initial load. The waitlist will be removed today for internal testing, with a small group of users invited first, followed by a wider public announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

## Topics

### Launch Strategy & Phased Rollout

  - [**Goal:** A phased launch to manage initial load and test system stability.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [**Today:** Remove the waitlist for internal testing.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Launch Day:** Export waitlist emails → import to Customer.io → send invites.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Communication:** A small, contained announcement will precede a larger public post (e.g., on LinkedIn).](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

### Scalability & Performance

  - [**Problem:** Unpredictable load from backfilling historical data could degrade core app performance during a launch traffic spike.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Solution:** Split the backfill process into a separate worker with its own queues.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Critical Queue:** Processes the last 7 days of data, which is required before a user can enter the app.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Low-Priority Queue:** Handles all older data.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**Contingency Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
      - [**Slow Backfills:** Increase worker count.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
      - [**Database Lag (Replication/Contention):** Decrease worker count or upgrade the database tier.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [**Trade-off:** Slower backfills for new users in exchange for maintaining core app stability.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Product & Billing

  - [**Historical Data Upgrade Path:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [**Status:** Wrapping up today.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Users on free/lower-tier plans see a lock icon for data older than their plan allows. Clicking it triggers an upgrade modal.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [**Post-Upgrade:** The system automatically backfills the newly unlocked data period.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [**Scope:** Unlimited historical data for the Business plan is deferred to a follow-up PR to prioritize production testing.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Billing Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Status:** Complete.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Missing:** No automated transactional emails (e.g., receipts, cancellations).](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Plan:** Use Stripe's UI settings to automate receipts and cancellation emails for launch. More complex lifecycle emails will be built in Customer.io.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [**Onboarding UI:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Status:** Functional, but needs polish for a better first impression.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Action:** Estevão will polish the UI today.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Onboarding Brand Lookup Fix:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Problem:** A brand lookup in the onboarding flow caused incorrect data to be returned (e.g., "branch.io" matched "branch.co").](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Solution:** The lookup will now be skipped if a user explicitly states their brand is not found in the initial search results.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Support & Analytics Stack

  - [**Intercom:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Function:** Primary support channel.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Knowledge Base:** Populated from Notion and code; used to train an AI co-pilot for fast, consistent answers.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Process:** User questions → "All inbox" → team member assignment → AI-assisted reply.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Admin Panel:** Includes an activity feed to view user events (page views, actions) for better support context.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Martech Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**RudderStack:** Central data router.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Customer.io:** Receives full user data and events for email campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**PostHog:** Receives events and offers superior session recording.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [**Intercom:** Receives basic user data (name).](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Google Analytics (GA):** Jason will verify the GTM configuration to resolve console errors.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### Workflows Framework

  - [**Platform:** Output.ai, running in an isolated `checkthat` namespace on Temporo.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [**Repo:** `checkthat-workflows`.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Structure:** Workflows in `source/workflows`; shared agents in `source/gx` (do not modify).](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Deployment:** Separate Render services (API, worker, Redis). The worker is autoscaling.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [**Known Gap:** No notification from workflows back to the app on failure. This is a potential source of "stuck" processes and will be addressed in a follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/G5aSZtgsbqQMtmHaxj7PgNi6e2-c2xcx?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
